question: Compute gradient norm and clip gradients using clip_grad_norm_ with max_norm=1.0.
template:
import torch
import torch.nn as nn

x = torch.randn(1, 10)
model = nn.Linear(10, 1)
target = torch.randn(1, 1)

loss = model(x).mean()
loss.backward()

grad_norm_before = torch.nn.utils.???_(model.parameters(), max_norm=1.0)
print(f"Grad norm after clip: {grad_norm_before:.4f}")
print(f"Max grad element: {model.weight.grad.abs().max().item():.4f}")
